name: Pachisi
author: Abstract Games Platform
description: Pachisi (पचीसी), the classic Indian cross-and-circle race game and ancestor of Ludo/Parcheesi. Four players each race four pieces out of the central Charkoni, anticlockwise around the cruciform board and back up their own arm. Movement is by six cowrie shells (mouths-up = move; special values 10 and 25, plus 6, grant a grace/extra turn). Castle squares are safe; landing on an opponent on a non-safe square sends it home.
